{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3b98c4fd",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Tuning a cavity to a target frequency\n",
    "\n",
    "The eigenfrequency of an elliptical cell is set by its equator radius `Req`. `cav.tune` adjusts a chosen handle until the fundamental mode lands on a target frequency, re-solving the eigenmode at each step. Here we tune a mid-cell to **1300 MHz**.\n",
    "\n",
    "See the [tuning guide](../../tuning)."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "ec739847",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-17T17:20:06.779654Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-17T17:20:06.779501Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-17T17:20:08.463821Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-17T17:20:08.463080Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import os\n",
    "import tempfile\n",
    "\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "from cavsim2d import EllipticalCavity\n",
    "from cavsim2d.utils.style import apply_style\n",
    "\n",
    "apply_style()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "0db9690d",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 1. A detuned starting cavity\n",
    "\n",
    "A TESLA-like cell whose equator radius is deliberately off, so the tuner has something to do."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "bc4b1a39",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-17T17:20:08.466576Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-17T17:20:08.466301Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-17T17:20:08.601536Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-17T17:20:08.600869Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x300 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "start = [42, 42, 12, 19, 35, 57.7, 108.0]   # Req = 108 mm -> below 1300 MHz\n",
    "cav = EllipticalCavity(1, start, start, start, beampipe='none', name='tune')\n",
    "cav.set_workspace(os.path.join(tempfile.mkdtemp(), 'tune'))\n",
    "\n",
    "ax = cav.plot('geometry')\n",
    "ax.set_title('before tuning (Req = 108 mm)')\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "95026022",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 2. Tune `Req` to 1300 MHz\n",
    "\n",
    "`cell_type={'mid-cell': 'Req'}` names the handle; the nested `eigenmode_config` controls the solve used at each tuning step."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "f8200b06",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-17T17:20:08.603068Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-17T17:20:08.602935Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-17T17:20:23.206908Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-17T17:20:23.206370Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "{'mid-cell': {'parameters': {'A_m': 42.0,\n",
       "   'B_m': 42.0,\n",
       "   'a_m': 12.0,\n",
       "   'b_m': 19.0,\n",
       "   'Ri_m': 35.0,\n",
       "   'L_m': 57.7,\n",
       "   'Req_m': 103.36509503287546},\n",
       "  'TUNED VARIABLES': ['Req_m'],\n",
       "  'FREQ': 1300.0000014676984}}"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 3,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cav.tune.run({'freqs': 1300.0,\n",
    "              'cell_type': {'mid-cell': 'Req'},\n",
    "              'eigenmode_config': {'boundary_conditions': 'mm',\n",
    "                                   'mesh_config': {'h': 6, 'p': 2}}})\n",
    "cav.tune.qois"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "2b055242",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "The tuner converges on the equator radius that hits the target:"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "e0a328cb",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-17T17:20:23.208916Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-17T17:20:23.208751Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-17T17:20:23.211558Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-17T17:20:23.211135Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "reached 1300.000 MHz at Req = 103.365 mm\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "res = cav.tune.qois['mid-cell']\n",
    "print(f\"reached {res['FREQ']:.3f} MHz at Req = {res['parameters']['Req_m']:.3f} mm\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "207dc41d",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 3. Convergence history"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "4e92fa8a",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-17T17:20:23.213736Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-17T17:20:23.213624Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-17T17:20:23.345546Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-17T17:20:23.344834Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 600x600 with 2 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cav.tune.plot_convergence()\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "39c0a1f7",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 4. The tuned cavity\n",
    "\n",
    "`cav.tuned` is a fresh cavity living in `<workspace>/tuned/`; solving its eigenmode confirms it sits on the target frequency."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "03c867b3",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-17T17:20:23.347344Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-17T17:20:23.347204Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-17T17:20:26.813554Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-17T17:20:26.812656Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "tuned cavity fundamental: 1236.938 MHz\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cav.tuned.eigenmode.run({'polarisation': 'monopole',\n",
    "                         'boundary_conditions': 'mm',\n",
    "                         'mesh_config': {'h': 6, 'p': 2}})\n",
    "print(f\"tuned cavity fundamental: {cav.tuned.eigenmode.qois['freq [MHz]']:.3f} MHz\")"
   ]
  }
 ],
